name: Sliced Oranges with Cranberry Coulis
recipeIngredient: 6 Oranges, peels and white membranes removed, cut into 1/2 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the cranberries, sugar, and orange juice uncovered in a medium size saucepan for 15 minutes.
2. Add the orange zest and water. Simmer uncovered another 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Strain the cranberry mixture through a fine mesh sieve. Stir in the liqueur. Let cool to room temperature.
4. On each of 6 dessert plates, make a pool of the cranberry coulis. Fan a sliced orange on each cranberry pool; spoon a little more cranberry coulis over the oranges.
